name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate cash flow forecasting instead of manual cash flow forecasting using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts due to manual data entry.
features: manual data entry for initial setup
user-friendly dashboard for cash flow overview
